title: Builder's Wrench
description: Adds useful wrench that can rotate and pickup blocks
body:
# Builder's Wrench

Adds useful wrench that can rotate and pickup blocks

It's similar to Create mod's wrench

![Wrench recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb8f975f9ff13eab9dbbc87d5bb18141d58aab0f.png)

## Rotating

Right click on block will rotate the block clockwise around the clicked face

![Rotating1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a14a2af2f223beef65402febe76ea478d8fcb146.png)![Rotating2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a98bd746f7260d510c9ca1d058ab1f44e646f1d.png)![Rotating3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e02eee90b510e6891476afbd0228c6f649f8976d.png)![Rotating4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d874a4a84503ae04edb26f8ddddf127a369273dc.png)





## Pickup

Shift - Right click will pickup every redstone component instantly to your inventory

![Pickup1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53415e7a3ae7a1450bce6e96e9cfc1cbbeb9d7f6.png)![Pickup2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/747b77c6c6246a1bbfe50f76dc64ea6f72e5ea2c.png)


## Automatization

You can also automate rotating using dispenser


[![Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7687f60c02535d479dc55156b8de1a776f63ebbb.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty)

[![Custom mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2e75104b0340c21d2685ed2d81a8ee8b1be0936.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty/commissions)

[![Discord](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/988472/description_ab810526-bb00-4248-9150-47c044ec2d87.png)](https://discord.gg/xByznP7RHw)
